chapter_title.ar: بَابُ كِفَايَةِ الْعِيَالِ وَ التَّوَسُّعِ عَلَيْهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – Adequacy for the dependants and extending upon them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/137)
text: كَفَى بِالْمَرْءِ إِثْماً أَنْ يُضَيِّعَ مَنْ يَعُولُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It suffices as a sin with a person that he wastes the ones whom he provides for’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hisham ibn Salim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is enough sin for one not to provide for his family and lose them.’”
